title: Foxy and Frens
description: Cute little modpack for the foxy and frens community server.
body:
**Vanilla Enhanced: Explore, Build, and Delight in a Smoother Minecraft**

Looking for a modpack that enhances your Minecraft experience without overwhelming changes?  This pack focuses on improving performance, visual fidelity, and adding delightful content that seamlessly integrates into vanilla gameplay.  Dive into stunning new landscapes generated by Terralith and YUNG's worldgen mods, enjoy a smoother, more responsive game thanks to performance optimizations, and savor the expanded culinary world of Farmer's Delight and its add-ons.

**Key Features:**

* **Optimized Performance:**  Enjoy a buttery-smooth experience with Sodium, Lithium, and other performance-enhancing mods.
* **Breathtaking Visuals:**  Immerse yourself in vibrant worlds with shaders (Iris), enhanced terrain (Terralith), and improved skies and lighting.
* **Expanded World Generation:**  Explore incredible and diverse landscapes thanks to Terralith and YUNG's Better [Structures] mods.
* **Farmer's Delight & Culinary Expansion:**  Discover a wealth of new foods, cooking mechanics, and kitchen decorations to enhance your culinary adventures.
* **Quality-of-Life Improvements:**  Enjoy numerous tweaks and additions that make your gameplay smoother and more enjoyable, from UI enhancements to inventory management.

This modpack is perfect for players who want a visually impressive, performant, and subtly enhanced vanilla Minecraft experience.
